title: Make email tracking & activities retroactive
excerpt: Hello all, I utilize the sending/outgoing email function within Monday.com on my boards to have all communication in one central location instead of going back and forth to my work email. Now that I have integrated my wo…

posts.author: TYLERKIM92 (Tyler Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello all, I utilize the sending/outgoing email function within Monday.com on my boards to have all communication in one central location instead of going back and forth to my work email. Now that I have integrated my work email and enabled the “email & activities” log, it would be nice to have all prior emails sent out within Monday.com show up on this activity log. If Monday.com could scrub/track the integrated email for these convo’s it would make it a lot easier and efficient.
